pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-S-006 (AI and Machine Learning/Skill) scores 0.424 composite (highest: EU AI Act at 0.424) and is edge_case for the Metadata Manager role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Metadata Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, EU AI Act signal (0.424), and AI and Machine Learning handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI/ML competencies for Metadata Manager at manager level?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI/ML overlap appears in 15-40% of Metadata Manager postings depending on seniority. Core signals: 0. OOS signals: 0.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. AI/ML content without sufficient core signals is not market-supported for Metadata Manager. Final decision: exclude.
